name: Dowel Console Table Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Give your entryway or living room a sleek and functional style update with this Dowel Console Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This oval console table showcases a clean-lined silhouette in a neutral finishes that blend easily with a range of different palettes and decor styles. The console table features a roomy wooden top surface to display your decor, while scalloped legs add an effortlessly on-trend look to your space. Place this console table along your entryway and decorate with books, frames or a vase to complete the display.
